notes: Estimator error bound: uncontrolled (legacy-grade); multi-shell extension tracked by G3PB-III.
title: BCC structural selection among tested ordered condensates
statement: Within the tested ordered-condensate class $\{\mathrm{LAM},\mathrm{HEX},\mathrm{FCC},\mathrm{SC},\mathrm{BCC}\}$ at one-loop Brazovskii level, BCC minimises the free energy at the operating point ($N_{\rm loop}$, $L_4$ coefficients): $F_{\rm BCC}<F_{\rm FCC}<F_{\rm SC}$.
scope: Tested representatives at one-loop; multi-shell caveat explicit; not an exhaustiveness statement.
falsifier: A tested-class competitor with lower free energy at the operating point under the corrected convention.
no_overclaim: BCC global optimality over all admissible structures.
next_action: Assemble Minimal Review Packet B from the migrated N_loop/L_4 evidence chain.
